arts.ttl: Paul Pogba hails Barcelona starlet: ‘He’s the best young player in the world’
arts.sum: Barcelona star Lamine Yamal has on Thursday come in for some fresh praise, on this occasion on the part of Paul Pogba. This, of course, comes as Lamine continues to…

arts.ttl: Barcelona to wait until next summer to decide one player’s future
arts.sum: The powers that be at La Liga giants Barcelona are ready to push contract talks with Iñaki Peña back until the end of the campaign. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo,…

arts.ttl: Barcelona give Chelsea and Man Utd edge in David transfer
arts.sum: The likes of Manchester United and Chelsea have been given a boost in the race to sign Jonathan David on a free transfer next summer. The hesitation by Barca over David could open the door for United and Chelsea, who have both held a long-term interest in the player and are likely to try for his signature when he is able to freely negotiate with clubs in January.

arts.ttl: ‘Impossible to be this good’ – Lewandowski on the Barcelona youngster who ‘wowed’ him
arts.sum: Barcelona star Robert Lewandowski has this week provided an insight into his first impressions of teammate Lamine Yamal. Wide-man Lamine and Lewandowski have of course long struck up a supreme…
Barcelona midfielder Alexia Putellas scored her 200th goal for the Catalan club in Thursday's Champions League win over Austrian side St. Pölten.

arts.ttl: Celta clash is a test to see if Barca can win without Yamal
arts.sum: With reports that Lamine Yamal is still struggling with an ankle problem, it’s all but certain that Barcelona’s star forward will miss his second game in a row when the Blaugrana visit Celta Vigo on Saturday. Barcelona weren’t able to break through against Real Sociedad perhaps in large part because Hansi Flick opted to replace his impact forward with Fermín López, a midfielder.

arts.ttl: Ex-Barcelona star confirms plans to celebrate if he scores against Blaugrana for Celta Vigo
arts.sum: Celta Vigo star Marcos Alonso has admitted that he intends to celebrate, if he finds the net against Barcelona this weekend. Defender Alonso, of course, brought a close to his…

arts.ttl: Two leading attackers have ‘sent messages to Barcelona to sign them’
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have been encouraged to launch assaults on the signatures of both Jonathan David and Rafael Leão by those closest to the players. That’s according to Mundo…

arts.ttl: Barca set to unveil new mascot as part of 125th anniversary
arts.sum: Barcelona are set to unveil a new club mascot as part of the club’s 125th anniversary celebrations. #FCBarcelona will announce a new mascot next week as part of their 125th anniversary celebrations.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star Lewandowski names Real Madrid legend as toughest-ever opponent
arts.sum: Barcelona star Robert Lewandowski has this week pointed towards a former member of the defensive ranks at arch rivals Real Madrid as the toughest opponent of his career. The player…
